dev_summary: Recent commits have expanded Admin's functionality with a robust tool management system, including automatic tool discovery, launch/stop controls, and a tool scaffolding feature powered by an LLM. Secure feed tokens and email invite buttons have also been implemented, alongside a lightweight issues tracker.
next_steps: Implement the 'think' service contract, mirroring the 'grove' service to fully enable inter-tool communication.
Develop the handler logic within `electron/main.js` to process requests to the 'think' service, integrating it into the capabilities gateway.
Create a UI element for the 'tool dev tracking' features (phase badges, summary, next steps) to allow users to monitor tool development progress.
